name: Venus' Luck
original_name: နတ်သမီးနက္ခတ်
overview:
The new Myanmar television drama series ‘Venus Luck’ is set to premiere on 10 May, according to Academy Wutt Hmone Shwe Yi, who plays a lead role in the production.

The storyline of the series was written by Moe Ni Lwin. The screenplay was co-written by Moe Ni Lwin and the Skyward Art Team, with direction by Pwint Theingi Zaw (Aron Oo).

Speaking about the series, Wutt Hmone Shwe Yi shared: “Venus Luck has already been aired on the BeeBee TV application. In the series, I portray the character of Chit Chit Htoo Zan, a young woman born under the Leo zodiac sign. The story follows her quest to find her soulmate among six charming but very different men. I’d like the audience to watch and enjoy how her romantic journey unfolds, and who she ultimately ends up with”

trailers.title: တားရော့ကဒ်တွေဟာ ဖူးစာရှင်အစစ်အမှန်ကို လမ်းညွှန်ပေးနိုင်သလား..?
